shared_attributes.position: center of 128x128 screen, on perch at y=60
shared_attributes.key_features: crest, cheek patch, tail - 3 essential cockatiel traits

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Autonomous behavior - randomly triggers during idle state (30% chance)
context.usage_scenario: Plays automatically when Echo decides to groom. Shows natural bird behavior. Lasts 5 seconds then returns to idle. Spawns 2-3 feather particles drifting sideways.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with head turned toward wing/body, grooming posture
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with hand-drawn organic edges, no gradients

animation.description: Frame 1: Head turns left toward wing. Frame 2: Beak touches wing area. Frame 3: Head turns right toward other wing. Frame 4: Beak touches right wing. Frame 5: Head returns to center. Alternating grooming motion.

visual_specification.details: Head rotation: approximately 45-degree turn left/right. Beak makes contact with wing area (indicated by 1-2px overlap). Crest in normal position. Eyes visible throughout. Feather particles (2x2px #FFA300) spawn and drift horizontally 3-4px before fading.

relationships.shared_with: Same body structure as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle: head rotated vs forward-facing. echo_eating: head turns sideways vs downward. Only state with lateral head rotation.

explicit_negations: Body does not twist (only head rotates)
No water droplets or bath elements
Feathers do not multiply excessively (max 3 visible)
